site.title: Zeni — Personal Finance Tracker
site.description: Track expenses effortlessly with AI. Voice input, receipt scanning, smart budgets, and natural language insights — all in one elegant app.

hero.headline: Money, tracked
hero.sub: Just say "coffee 4.50" — Zeni understands. AI parses your expenses from text, voice, or a photo of your receipt. No forms, no categories to memorise.

mockup.aiNote: AI understood: lunch expense with colleagues

features.sectionSub: A self-hosted finance tracker built for people who want clarity without complexity.

commandBar.title: ⌘K to log anything
commandBar.body: Open the command bar and type naturally — "sushi 28 dinner with Sarah" — or navigate the app. Zeni's AI extracts the amount, category, date, and tags automatically.

voice.title: Voice input
voice.body: Tap the mic and speak your expense. Whisper transcribes it locally or via an external provider — your choice, your data.
voice.detail: Local Whisper · External STT · No audio leaves your server

receipt.title: Receipt scanning
receipt.body: Paste or attach a photo of any receipt. The AI reads the total, merchant, and date — no manual entry needed.
receipt.detail: Paste from clipboard · Attach file · Instant parse

chat.title: Chat with your data
chat.body: Ask anything in plain language. "How much did I spend on food last month?" — Zeni answers with your actual numbers.
chat.bubbleUser: Any tips on where I could cut back?
chat.bubbleAi: Your dining spend is 34% above last month. Cooking at home 2–3 more times per week could save ~$120.

budgets.title: Smart budgets
budgets.body: Set weekly or monthly limits per category. Get warned at 80% and alerted when exceeded — right on the dashboard.

recurring.title: Recurring expenses
recurring.body: Track subscriptions and regular bills. Set daily, weekly, biweekly, monthly, or yearly schedules — Zeni reminds you when they're due.

wallets.title: Multiple wallets
wallets.body: Separate personal, business, and shared expenses across wallets. Each wallet has its own currency, history, and analytics.

categories.title: Categories & tags
categories.body: Organise with emoji-icon categories and freeform tags. The AI suggests both automatically — you can always override.

dashboard.title: Dashboard at a glance
dashboard.body: Monthly total, weekly pace, daily average, budget status, recent transactions, and a category breakdown chart — all loading instantly on open.

privacy.title: Your data stays
privacy.sub: Zeni runs entirely on your own infrastructure. No cloud sync, no third-party analytics, no subscription fees.
checklist: Bring your own AI provider (Anthropic, OpenAI, etc.)
Local Whisper STT — no audio leaves your server
MCP server for AI assistant integrations

cta.title: Start tracking
cta.sub: Open source, self-hosted, and built to last. No subscriptions, no lock-in.
